docker-sbom.command: trivy image --format cyclonedx --output {args.dockerSbomPath} {args.namespace}/{projectName}:{args.version} && cyclonedx merge --name {args.namespace}/{projectName}:{args.version} --input-files {args.appSbomPath} {args.dockerSbomPath} --input-format json --output-file {projectRoot}/sbom.json --output-format json --output-version v1_6

metadata.description: Generate a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for the Docker image using Trivy and merge it with the SBOM generated from the application dependencies
